# Gloucester City Council — AI crawler guidance
# https://llmstxt.org

> Official council tax, planning, bins, and parking information
> for Gloucester. Published by Gloucester City Council.
> Primary authoritative domain: https://www.gloucester.gov.uk

## Council Tax

- Council Tax hub: /council-tax-2/
- Moving in or moving out: /council-tax-2/moving/
- Understanding your bill: /council-tax-2/your-bill/
- Discounts based on who lives with you: /council-tax-2/occupants/
- Living alone (Single Person Discount): /council-tax-2/occupants/living-alone/
- Students in your home: /council-tax-2/occupants/students-in-your-home/
- Someone at your address doesn't count (disregards): /council-tax-2/occupants/someone-doesnt-count/
- My home is adapted for a disabled person (Disabled Band Reduction): /council-tax-2/disabled-band-reduction/
- Care leavers aged 18 to 24 (100% discount): /council-tax-2/care-leavers/
- Struggling to pay: /council-tax-2/struggling-to-pay/
- Council Tax Support (income-based reduction): /council-tax-2/council-tax-support/
- Empty home: /council-tax-2/empty-home/
- Second home: /council-tax-2/second-home/
